row.dgeevx_order_note: DGEBAL(N) → DGEHRD → DORGHR(Q in VR) → DHSEQR(Schur VR) → DTREVC3 → Python

live_vs_vend_plate.scope_note: live=final Engine principal column; vend=Schur VR plate at DLAQR5 sweep-8 entry

sweep8_m5_oracle_gap.note: K49 closed association-only REFSUM reorder; flip_delta is minimum signed Z(44,K) perturbation before DO-140 to flip replay row leader.

sweep68_z_plate_bridge.note: K63: live kmax=44 needs sub-ULP Z(44,K) bias at m5pre; bridge locates where sweep-6 K-asymmetry (z44_k=0) is restored.

s8_entry_restoration_trace.note: Pinpoints whether K-row symmetry restoration happens in dlaqr0 gap (shift setup) or only inside DLAQR5 entry.
